=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_valid
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_valid/returns_no_error
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_valid/extracts_the_email_claim
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_expired
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_expired/returns_a_TokenExpiredError
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_expired/includes_expiry_in_the_error_message
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_signature_is_tampered
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_signature_is_tampered/returns_ErrInvalidSignature
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_malformed
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestValidateToken/the_token_is_malformed/returns_ErrTokenMalformed
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/strong_password_with_mixed_characters
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/strong_password_with_mixed_characters/evaluates_the_password_correctly
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/too_short
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/too_short/evaluates_the_password_correctly
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/missing_special_characters
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/missing_special_characters/evaluates_the_password_correctly
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/missing_digits
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/missing_digits/evaluates_the_password_correctly
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/exactly_at_minimum_length
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestPasswordPolicy/exactly_at_minimum_length/evaluates_the_password_correctly
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat/standard_email
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat/standard_email/checking_the_format
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat/standard_email/checking_the_format/matches_as_expected
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat/standard_email/checking_the_format/passes_the_full_regex
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat/missing_at_sign
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat/missing_at_sign/checking_the_format
=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestEmailFormat/missing_at_sign/checking_the_format/matches_as_expected

=== RUN   TestTokenValidatorTestSuite/TestParseConfig/the_config_string_is_provided/returns_the_parsed_value
